extract: Scald (Japanese: ねっとう Boiling Water) is a damage-dealing Water-type move introduced in Generation V. It is: TM55 from Generation V to Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon. TM29 in Pokémon: Let's Go, Pikachu! and Let's Go, Eevee!. TR84 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM49 in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl. TM188 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM148 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
